title: Simpler Tooltips
description: Makes tooltips slightly transparent and less purple
body: Simplifies the appearance of tooltips by making them slightly transparent and removing the purple outline using core shaders ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6711f069dd21514c92a0135c715b0e2d6af747a.png) Should be compatible with any mod using vanilla-like tooltips
